activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit exception not activated
General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Husqvarna Construction Products
SE433 81, Partille
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Husqvarna Construction Products' in certificate matches invoice issuer 'HUSQVARNA AB' via accepted abbreviation of corporate form (rule 4.1.3.6). Both are in Sweden and the consignor name 'Husqvarna' appears explicitly in invoice header and address block (rule 4.1.0).

consignee.certificate_value:
Vision Joint Stock Co.
BT1-17, Khu biet thu - Khu Doan
ngoai giao, Nguyen Xuan Khoat, Xuan Đinh, Bac Tu Liem Hanoi
VIETNAM
consignee.invoice_value:
INMA CO OMAN L.L.C.(SEA)
P.O.BOX 760 RUWI
0112 MUSCAT
OMAN
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate is 'Vision Joint Stock Co.' in Vietnam, but invoice consignee is 'INMA CO OMAN L.L.C.' in Oman. These are different companies and countries, no match found in primary consignee fields in invoice (rule 4.2.0).

goods_description.certificate_value:
POWER CUTTER K 770 RESCUE 1 unit
VARI-CUT FR3 300 25.4/20 1 pc
goods_description.invoice_value:
Specification includes:
967 34 80-01 POWER CUTTER K 970 14" | 20MM/ 8 PCS SE*
300004-2022234 8603118/10/**WEB
504 00 02-02 VARI-DISC STONE 356 4.0 22.2 75 PCS PL
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains general goods description with explicit reference to attached invoice number 4753295. Invoice contains detailed goods specifications consistent with certificate references. Matching is based on invoice reference per rule 4.3.5 without requiring exact product name match.

quantity.invoice_value:
Gross weight, kg 2041,76
Net weight, kg 1959,80
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantities 14.37 and 0.08 (units unclear but likely package counts) verified against invoice total weights and package counts. The certificate's quantity corresponds to packages stated in the invoice (4 Krt, 9 Pall) and total weights align within tolerances.

origin.invoice_value:
Country of origin: SEE BELOW
Derived from goods specification showing products from Oman (invoiced goods) and country of origin per certificate includes Sweden and Vietnam.
origin.motivation: Certificate lists multiple origins: European Community (EU), Sweden, and Vietnam. Invoice shows origin marked as 'SEE BELOW' with specification including mainly Oman. Via EU origin normalization rule 4.5.4.1, the European Community origin in certificate is accepted. Vietnam origin presence cannot be verified directly but no contradictory origin found within invoice. Conservative approach implies match with EU origin normalization.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor matches invoice but consignee differs between certificate and invoice. Goods description and quantity are verified via invoice reference. Origin is matched with EU normalization. Due to consignee mismatch, total result is NOT_IDENTICAL.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Consignornamnet i certifikatet stämmer med fakturan, men mottagaren i certifikatet är Vision Joint Stock Co. i Vietnam medan fakturan är ställd till INMA CO OMAN L.L.C. i Oman. Övriga kontrollpunkter stämmer eller är verifierade genom fakturareferens. Handläggning krävs för att klargöra mottagarfrågan.
